nodes.name: San Francisco
nodes.summary: A city in California with a severe housing affordability crisis.

nodes.name: Universal Basic Income Pilot Program
nodes.summary: A program providing $1,000 per month to 1,000 residents for two years.

nodes.name: Residents
nodes.summary: 1,000 randomly selected residents receiving the universal basic income.

nodes.name: Business Groups
nodes.summary: Groups opposing the tax on commercial real estate transactions.

nodes.name: 0.5% Tax
nodes.summary: A tax on commercial real estate transactions above $5 million.

nodes.name: Commercial Real Estate Transactions
nodes.summary: Transactions above $5 million subject to the 0.5% tax.

nodes.name: Housing Affordability Crisis
nodes.summary: A severe crisis in San Francisco with median rent exceeding $3,500 per month.

nodes.name: Court
nodes.summary: The court where business groups will challenge the tax.
